title: Packet 028 And Packet 029 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish Packet 028 closure authority and Packet 029 planning authority through `C:/APEX Platform`, then fast-forward-only synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` so the later relay browser source trial does not depend on workstation-only governance records.
active_role: Olares Post-029 Authority Publication And Resync Operator
dependency_note: Packet 029 selects the relay browser selection reset surface as the next bounded production-source trial but concludes Packet 028 and Packet 029 closure authority must be published and host-resynchronized before any later host-side source or test execution depends on it.
required_inputs: Current workstation parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform`
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, cleanliness, and Packet 028 or Packet 029 authority presence evidence
constrained_outputs: A bounded publication commit containing only Packet 028 and Packet 029 closure authority plus minimal routing or roadmap updates and this Packet 030 JSON
A dated execution handoff recording publication scope, commit hash, push disposition, host fast-forward-only resync evidence, and old-clone preservation

No runtime mutation, service change, install work, package or lockfile change, source edit, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, AI-services rollout, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, or old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Verify Packet 029 completed and did not approve migration or execute source edits.
Verify `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at the Packet 028 governing commit before publication.
Limit the publication set to Packet 028 and Packet 029 closure authority, minimal routing or roadmap updates, and the authored Packet 030 JSON.
Exclude `.vercelignore`, runtime artifacts, generated artifacts, secrets, package files, lockfiles, source edits, and unrelated workspace changes.
Publish the bounded parent-root commit to `clean-main` and record the commit hash.
Fast-forward-only synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit.
Verify the host mirror is clean and contains Packet 028 and Packet 029 closure authority.
Stop if additional host drift exists or if resync would require force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, runtime mutation, service mutation, install work, source edits, or old-clone mutation.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes only bounded authority publication and host-mirror resync. It does not authorize database writes, runtime mutation, service changes, install work, package changes, source edits, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, migration approval, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Not yet executed. Packet 030 is prepared as the bounded authority publication and host-mirror resync gate after Packet 029.
next_action: Execute only as a bounded authority publication and host parity restoration lane. Do not use Packet 030 to approve migration, mutate runtime, change services, install dependencies, edit source, rewrite remotes, force, reset, clean, or mutate the old clone.
